title: Corrective fix for B-d227aba7-review: Review takt init: create specs/planned subfolder alongside done and drafts
description:
Blocked reason: commit_scaffold() (onboarding.py:636-639) creates .gitkeep sentinels for specs/drafts/ and specs/done/ but omits specs/planned/. The directory is created by scaffold_project() at line 770 but will not be git-tracked after the scaffold commit. docs/onboarding.md:174 explicitly documents a .gitkeep in planned/. The test suite also lacks an assertion for specs/planned/.gitkeep.

Remaining work: Fix commit_scaffold() to add specs/planned to gitkeep_dirs; add test assertion for specs/planned/.gitkeep.
acceptance_criteria: Implement the minimum fix required to unblock B-d227aba7-review.
Update tests/docs as needed for the corrective change.
Leave a handoff summary that states how the parent bead can be retried.
conflict_risks: None — single-line addition in the isolated gitkeep_dirs list of commit_scaffold().
